title: roettlera hamosa
intro: Roettlera hamosa, also known as the "Mukul tree" or "Indian frankincense", is a plant species that belongs to the family Burseraceae. The resin extracted from the Roettlera hamosa plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Roettlera hamosa include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Roettlera hamosa can be prepared as herbal teas, capsules, or topical creams for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
